title: How a man of God handles the season nobody is watching
caption:
Nobody's watching. God is.

That's the thing about the quiet years — they feel like nothing until you're ten years out and realize that's where the whole man was built. The job that didn't fit. The city you didn't choose. The Tuesday nobody photographed.

All of it counted.

The hard part is the phone makes it feel longer. Comparison and envy fill the silence — watching everyone else's highlight reel while yours sits on pause. The man who fills the silence with scroll never hears what the season is actually building.

So here's what you do in the years nobody is watching: show up anyway. Do the next thing faithfully. Guard the quiet. Stop engineering your reputation.

"A man's gift makes room for him." — Proverbs 18:16.

You don't have to force anything. Just do the work. He makes the room.

—

Comment "quiet" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #thework #christianity #scripture
